blockingIssues.description: examples/claude-desktop-config.json uses `service start` instead of a valid MCP server connection command/config for Claude Desktop.
Required docs/integrations setup guides were not added.
Error-handling audit incomplete: multiple catch blocks still return raw errors instead of standardized ServiceError/formatError paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce that mission feature skillName values must reference installed skills and fail mission planning validation otherwise.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reported feature metadata with skillName=worker while worker skill was unavailable, causing direct skill invocation failure in transcript.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit completion gate that feature key tasks listed in mission features must all be present (e.g., required directories/files), and include a checklist item to verify ServiceError/formatError usage in modified catch blocks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m3 review found missing docs/integrations artifacts and incomplete error-audit adoption despite feature claiming completion.
